ats_scoring.name: ATS Scoring
ats_scoring.description: Prompts for Applicant Tracking System scoring and analysis

resume_intelligence.name: Resume Intelligence
resume_intelligence.description: Prompts for comprehensive resume analysis and insights

ksc_generation.name: KSC Generation
ksc_generation.description: Prompts for Key Selection Criteria responses

cover_letter.name: Cover Letter Generation
cover_letter.description: Prompts for generating tailored cover letters

interview_prep.name: Interview Preparation
interview_prep.description: Prompts for interview questions and preparation

length_instructions.concise: Keep each section concise (2-3 sentences each). Total response should be 200-300 words.
length_instructions.standard: Provide detailed but focused responses (3-4 sentences each). Total response should be 300-450 words.
length_instructions.comprehensive: Provide comprehensive, detailed responses (4-6 sentences each). Total response should be 450-600 words.

ksc_detail_levels.simple: Return a JSON object with exactly four string keys: "situation", "task", "action", "result". Each value should be a clear, specific paragraph of 2-4 sentences.
ksc_detail_levels.full: Return a JSON object with keys: "ksc_analysis" (object with: ksc_interpretation string, key_competencies array, success_factors array, common_pitfalls array), "experience_selection" (object with: chosen_experience string, relevance_score integer 0-100, selection_rationale string, alternative_experiences array), "star_response" (object with: situation string, task string, action string, result string, full_response string), "optimization_suggestions" (object with: strength_areas array, improvement_areas array, alternative_approaches array).
